title: Commentary: AI will change warfare but people remain core to SAF
description: As artificial intelligence shapes warfare development around the world, the SAF must enhance relations between man and machine, says defence consultancy managing director Nicholas Fang.

title: Markets live: Oil prices surge after US launches strikes on Iran, ASX to slip after Wall Street's tech sell-off
description: The Australian share market is likely to fall in morning trade after a sell-off across technology and artificial intelligence (AI) stocks knocked Wall Street's tech index sharply lower. Oil prices surged after the US confirmed it launched strikes on Iran, after three commercial ships were attacked near the Strait of Hormuz. Follow live.

title: Five-agent AI team could speed clinical trial design using real-world patient records
description: An artificial intelligence system that operates like a collaborative team of medical experts could accelerate clinical trial design, one of the most difficult steps in drug development, according to a new study by Weill Cornell Medicine investigators. The findings, published in Nature Communications, evaluated the potential of the system, called EmulatRx, to simulate, design and improve clinical trials using real-world patient data. A necessary step before a drug is approved for the market, a randomized clinical trial is a rigorous study in which participants are randomly assigned to separate groups to evaluate how well treatments or interventions work and their side effects.

title: Sacramento County coroner uses AI-generated image to help identify unhoused man who died
description: Authorities are trying to identify a resident of a Sacramento homeless shelter who died earlier this year and have generated an image of the man using artificial intelligence to seek the public's help.

title: kind government report says AI not yet causing mass job lay
description: Artificial intelligence is not yet causing a broad disruption to Australia's labour market, according to a government report.
content:
Amid warnings that artificial intelligence could wipe out white-collar jobs and cause high-profile lay-offs, the federal government's first major look at AI's effect on employment has found the sky is not falling.

title: Deep learning reveals nanoparticle shape from routine tracking analysis without new hardware
description: Researchers at the University of Tokyo and the Innovation Center of NanoMedicine (iCONM) have developed an artificial intelligence (AI) approach that identifies the morphology of nanoparticles in liquid using data from standard nanoparticle tracking analysis (NTA), a widely used technique for particle sizing. The method achieved classification accuracies exceeding 80% for non-spherical nanoparticles without requiring modification of existing instruments.

title: 3i Infotech unit wins AED 17.65m order for IT consulting
description: 3i Infotech Software Solutions L.L.C., a step-down wholly owned subsidiary of 3i Infotech, has secured an order worth AED 17,651,620 (INR 45.85 crore) from Vedant Consultancy FZ LLC, UAE. The order, dated June 30, 2026, is for providing IT consulting services in Robotic Process Automation, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Robotics. The engagement is valid for 12 months from May 1, 2026 to April 30, 2027.
